challenges.title: Delete a word
challenges.objective: Delete the word extra with dw.
challenges.hint: Place the cursor at the start of extra, then type dw.

challenges.title: Delete a line
challenges.hint: Use j to reach the line, then dd.

challenges.title: Delete one character
challenges.objective: Remove the extra x from Vixm.
challenges.hint: x deletes the character under the cursor.
